CMG.definition: represent the change in period-over-period total revenue or transactions for company-owned restaurants in operation for at least 13 full calendar months.

periods.definition: represent the change in period-over-period total revenue or transactions for company-owned restaurants in operation for at least 13 full calendar months.

source.quote: The increase was driven by new restaurant openings and, to a lesser extent, a 0.5% increase in comparable restaurant sales due to higher transactions of 0.6%, partially offset by a 0.1% decrease in average check.

source.quote: Comparable restaurant sales decreased 2.5% due to lower transactions of 3.2%, partially offset by a 0.7% increase in average check.

periods.definition: represent the change in period-over-period total revenue or transactions for company-owned restaurants in operation for at least 13 full calendar months.

source.quote: The increase in total revenue was driven by new restaurant openings and a 0.3% increase in comparable restaurant sales due to a 1.1% increase in average check, partially offset by lower transactions of 0.8%.

periods.definition: represent the change in period-over-period total revenue or transactions for company-owned restaurants in operation for at least 13 full calendar months.

source.quote: Comparable restaurant sales decreased 4.0% due to lower transactions of 4.9%, partially offset by a 0.9% increase in average check.
Total sales increased 5.9% to $3.3 billion, driven by a blended same-restaurant sales 1 increase of 4.2%

Total sales increased 10.4% to $3.0 billion, driven by a blended same-restaurant sales 1 increase of 4.7%

MCD.definition: Increases or decreases in comparable sales represent the percent change in constant currency sales from the same period in the prior year for all restaurants, whether owned and operated by the Company or by franchisees, in operation at least thirteen months, including those temporarily closed.

periods.definition: Increases or decreases in comparable sales represent the percent change in constant currency sales from the same period in the prior year for all restaurants, whether owned and operated by the Company or by franchisees, in operation at least thirteen months, including those temporarily closed.

Increases or decreases in comparable sales represent the percent change in constant currency sales from the same period in the prior year for all restaurants, whether owned and operated by the Company or by franchisees, in operation at least thirteen months, including those temporarily closed.

Increases or decreases in comparable sales represent the percent change in constant currency sales from the same period in the prior year for all restaurants, whether owned and operated by the Company or by franchisees, in operation at least thirteen months, including those temporarily closed.
